title: Weld Strength Calculator
description: Industrial-grade weld strength analysis per ISO 5817, AWS D1.1, and Lean Six Sigma principles. Calculates allowable load, safety margin, and process capability with data confidence adjustment.

inputs.label: Weld Type
inputs.businessContext: Determines the geometry factor and stress distribution model per AWS D1.1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Determines the geometry factor and stress distribution model per AWS D1.1.

inputs.label: Base Material Yield Strength
inputs.businessContext: Yield strength of the weaker base material (ISO 898 / ASTM A36).

businessContext_i18n.en: Yield strength of the weaker base material (ISO 898 / ASTM A36).

inputs.label: Weld Material Tensile Strength
inputs.businessContext: Tensile strength of filler metal (e.g., ER70S-6).

businessContext_i18n.en: Tensile strength of filler metal (e.g., ER70S-6).

inputs.label: Effective Throat Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Minimum throat dimension per ISO 5817 quality level B.

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum throat dimension per ISO 5817 quality level B.

inputs.label: Weld Length
inputs.businessContext: Total length of the weld seam.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total length of the weld seam.

inputs.label: Applied Load
inputs.businessContext: Service load acting on the weld joint.

businessContext_i18n.en: Service load acting on the weld joint.

inputs.label: Load Angle (from weld axis)
inputs.businessContext: Angle between applied load and weld longitudinal axis. 90° = transverse, 0° = longitudinal.

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle between applied load and weld longitudinal axis. 90° = transverse, 0° = longitudinal.

inputs.label: Quality Level (ISO 5817)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 5817 weld quality level: B=stringent, C=moderate, D=basic.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 5817 weld quality level: B=stringent, C=moderate, D=basic.

inputs.label: Inspection Method
inputs.businessContext: NDT method used; affects confidence factor.

businessContext_i18n.en: NDT method used; affects confidence factor.

inputs.label: Fatigue Loading
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies S-N curve reduction per AWS D1.1 fatigue categories.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies S-N curve reduction per AWS D1.1 fatigue categories.

rules.message: Fillet weld throat thickness below 3 mm may cause inadequate fusion per ISO 5817.
Load angle must be between 0 and 180 degrees.
Base material yield strength exceeds weld tensile strength – risk of weld under-matching.

thresholds.message: Safety margin below 1.5 – review design per AWS D1.1 clause 2.4.
Safety margin below 1.0 – joint failure imminent under specified load.
Data confidence low – consider additional NDT or material testing.

formulas.label: Stress Distribution Factor (K)
formulas.formula: CASE weld_type WHEN 'fillet' THEN 0.707 WHEN 'groove' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'butt' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END
formulas.description: Factor accounting for weld geometry and stress concentration per AWS D1.1 Table 2.1.

formulas.label: Allowable Stress
formulas.formula: weld_material_tensile_strength * 0.3 * (CASE quality_level WHEN 'B' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'C' THEN 0.85 WHEN 'D' THEN 0.7 END)
formulas.description: Reduced allowable stress based on quality level and safety factor (0.3 for shear per AWS).

formulas.label: Transverse Load Component
formulas.description: Load component perpendicular to weld axis.

formulas.label: Longitudinal Load Component
formulas.description: Load component parallel to weld axis.

formulas.label: Fatigue Reduction Factor
formulas.formula: CASE WHEN is_fatigue_loading = true THEN 0.5 ELSE 1.0 END
formulas.description: Reduction factor for fatigue loading per AWS D1.1 fatigue category E.

formulas.label: Weld Strength Capacity
formulas.description: Maximum load the weld can sustain.

primary.label: Safety Margin
primary.description: Ratio of capacity to applied load. Target ≥ 1.5 per ISO 5817.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Undermatching Penalty
hiddenLossDrivers.description: If base material yield > weld tensile, capacity is reduced by 20%.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Quality Level Derating
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Lower quality levels (C, D) reduce allowable stress by 15-30%.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Inspection Method Uncertainty
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Visual inspection adds 10% uncertainty; ultrasonic/radiographic reduce uncertainty.

suggestedActions.label: Increase throat thickness
suggestedActions.action: Increase throat thickness by 20% or use larger weld size.

suggestedActions.label: Upgrade quality level to B
suggestedActions.action: Implement ISO 5817 Level B inspection and process control.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce applied load
suggestedActions.action: Redesign joint to reduce load by 30% or add reinforcement.

suggestedActions.label: Use higher strength filler metal
suggestedActions.action: Select filler with tensile strength ≥ 1.2x base material yield.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.formula: 0.7 + (CASE inspection_method WHEN 'ultrasonic' THEN 0.2 WHEN 'radiographic' THEN 0.25 WHEN 'magnetic_particle' THEN 0.15 ELSE 0.0 END) - (CASE quality_level WHEN 'D' THEN 0.1 WHEN 'C' THEN 0.05 ELSE 0.0 END)
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Confidence factor (0 to 1) based on NDT method and quality level.
